arts.ttl: I told Arsenal to let me stay at Brentford and I became their goalkeeper of the decade
arts.sum: While the Gunners' current number one was still a youth team player in Catalonia for third-tier club Cornella, one Wojciech Szczesny was making his debut for the Bees after joining them on a one-month loan in November 2009. A matter of days later, Arsenal announced that Szczesny would stay in west London until the end of May - while the goalkeeper made 28 appearances in total as Brentford finished ninth and 18 points adrift of the play-off places.

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel to miss Brentford vs Arsenal as England duty begins
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel is expected to miss Brentford vs Arsenal on his first day as England manager.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta breaks silence on Arsenal transfer plans after Matheus Cunha development
arts.sum: Wolves' Matheus Cunha has been identified as a potential replacement for Saka, according to various reports. Wolves are determined to keep hold of 25-year-old Cunha, with Mirror Football reporting that the club is not looking to sell him mid-season unless a significant offer comes in.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer shortlist leaked as eight-man January window wishlist revealed
arts.sum: Gunners manager Mikel Arteta is said to have the club's financial backing and is reportedly monitoring several players as Arsenal aims to strengthen its forward line. The Gunners are said to monitor any potential changes to Newcastle's summer plans, depending on whether they qualify for the Champions League and how that impacts their finances.

arts.ttl: Declan Rice's eight-word confession about Mikel Arteta as private chat comes to light
arts.sum: The levels Mikel Arteta has set at Arsenal are the reason why he's transformed their fortunes - and they left mega-money signing Declan Rice overwhelmed upon his arrival in 2023

arts.ttl: Arsenal flop celebrates New Year's Eve with adult film star girlfriend Teanna Trump
arts.sum: Expensive Arsenal flop Nicolas Pepe celebrated 2024 turning into 2025 by spending the evening with his partner, adult film star Teanna Trump, who have gone public with their relationship

arts.ttl: Barcelona lose top spot, Man Utd climb to third - the clubs with the highest attendances in 2024
arts.sum: Football would be nothing without its fans and 2024 was yet another example of how much the punters that make their way through the turnstiles and on the terraces each and every weekend make up the...

arts.ttl: How Arsenal must overhaul squad: Who Gunners should keep and sell ahead of big transfer year
arts.sum: Arsenal need to offload some deadwood and strengthen in key areas

arts.ttl: Full Arsenal squad available vs Brentford as four players ruled out after Mikel Arteta update
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta's side make the trip to the Gtech Community Stadium on New Year's Day looking to secure another precious three points in their quest to win the league title. Riccardo Calafiori is a contender to start for Arsenal, though, after being restricted to just three appearances across the last ten Premier League matches due to a knee injury.

arts.ttl: Free agent Dani Olmo: What next for Barcelona as Arsenal, Man Utd circle?
arts.sum: Dani Olmo's registration with LaLiga has officially expired, meaning that he is now free to terminate his Barcelona contract. The club had hoped that selling off their VIP seats of the new Camp Nou to investors in Qatar and Dubai would enable them to secure the eligibility of Olmo prior to the December 31 deadline, but LaLiga announced on Tuesday that the Catalans had failed to achieve this.
